programmer_notes: Ed25519 (RFC 8032) in pure Python (hashlib only); Node ID + W3C did:key (multicodec 0xed01 + base58btc 'z'). Cross-validated byte-identical to libsodium across 200 random keys both directions; did:key codec validated against the W3C canonical example. New: src/gither/peer.py, tests/test_peer.py (10 tests), docs/P2P_PROTOCOL.md, 'gither peer' CLI. Private seed at .gither/identity/node.key (0600, gitignored).
summary: add Radicle-inspired peer identity (pure-Python Ed25519 did:key)
why: Gither is positioned as a serverless P2P GitHub duplicate but had no P2P-git primitives. Peer identity is the cryptographic root that repository IDs, signed refs, and gossip all anchor to. Modeled on Radicle Heartwood; pure stdlib to keep gither dependency-free.
